taxonomy: Urticastrum pterostigma is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The genus Urticastrum is part of the order Asterales. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Urticastrum pterostigma is also known as desert fireweed, a name that reflects its appearance and habitat. The classification of Urticastrum pterostigma places it within the plant kingdom as an angiosperm.
